metadata.title: Alba Dialysis and Transplants | Your Family in Kidney Care in León, Guanajuato
metadata.description: Over 25 years walking alongside patients and families on their path to kidney health. Hemodialysis, hemodiafiltration, and kidney transplant with warmth and empathy in León, Guanajuato.

hero.title: Your kidney wellness
hero.tagline: Over 25 years of excellence in kidney care
hero.subtitle: Over 25 years walking hand in hand with our patients and their families, because your wellbeing is also ours.

heroScroll.label: You're not alone
heroScroll.description: We know this journey is difficult. That's why we're here for you and your family. Together, every step is easier.
heroScroll.description2: We are family. A team that knows you by name, celebrates your progress, and walks with you through difficult days. Because your wellbeing is our priority.
heroScroll.statement: Let us hold your hand and your family's.

albaStatement.contentDescription: We believe that true excellence is cared for with the heart of empathy. Our approach goes beyond advanced technology — we care for your body and your soul, walking alongside you and your family because here, family goes beyond blood.

services.title: Comprehensive Care For You and Your Family
services.subtitle: It's not just dialysis. It's your life, your health, your body and your soul.

familyMission.headline: More than a clinic, we are family
familyMission.description: We know that kidney disease doesn't just affect you, but your whole family. That's why every service is designed to care for you and support those around you.

hemodialysis.title: Hemodialysis
hemodialysis.description: Sessions that restore your energy and wellbeing. Cutting-edge technology so every treatment is more comfortable and effective.

hemodiafiltration.title: Hemodiafiltration
hemodiafiltration.description: A more advanced technique that means fewer symptoms, more energy, and better quality of life during your treatment.

transplant.title: Kidney Transplant
transplant.description: We accompany you every step toward a new chance at life. From evaluation to post-transplant follow-up.

nutrition.title: Renal Nutrition
nutrition.description: Learn to eat deliciously and healthily. Personalized plans that adapt to your life and tastes, not the other way around.

psychology.title: Psychological Assessment
psychology.description: Because your emotional wellbeing matters as much as your physical health. Professional support for you and your family at every stage.

physiotherapy.title: Intradialysis Physiotherapy
physiotherapy.description: Stay active and strong. Exercises during your session that improve mobility and help you feel better every day.

surgery.title: Surgical Procedures
surgery.description: Vascular access and transplant preparation with the highest standards of safety and care.

nephrology.title: Nephrology Consultation
nephrology.description: Personalized care with nephrologists who know you, listen to you, and design the best plan for you.

education.question: What is hemodialysis?
education.answer: Hemodialysis is a treatment that performs the filtering function that your kidneys can no longer do on their own. Your blood passes through a special filter that removes toxins, waste, and excess fluids, helping to keep your body in balance.

point1.title: Blood filtration
point1.description: Removes toxins and waste that your kidneys can no longer process.

point2.title: 3-4 hours per session
point2.description: Usually 3 times per week, with flexible scheduling.

point3.title: Improves your wellbeing
point3.description: Regain energy and maintain a better quality of life.

about.title: Our Story
about.subtitle: Over two decades dedicated to kidney health
about.heroHeadline: Caring for kidney health in the Bajio region for over 25 years

mission.title: Mission
mission.content: To accompany every patient and their family on the path toward a new opportunity in life, caring for their body and soul with empathy, warmth, and the best available technology.

vision.title: Vision
vision.content: To be the light on the horizon for those facing kidney disease in the Bajio region — a place where every patient finds hope, family, and a peaceful smile.

values.title: Our Values
values.compassionDescription: The heart of everything we do. We treat each patient as family, understanding that behind every treatment there is a person with hopes, fears, and dreams.
values.excellenceDescription: We believe excellence is cared for with the heart of empathy. Every treatment, every process, every interaction reflects our commitment to the highest quality of care.
values.integrityDescription: Family goes beyond blood. It's empathy, love, and harmony. Here you'll find a team that knows you by name and walks with you every step of the way.
values.innovationDescription: Like the dawn that gives us our name, we believe in new beginnings. Every day is an opportunity to renew, to heal, to find light on the horizon.
values.balanceDescription: True wellbeing is the balance between a stable body and a living soul. We care for both, because health is not just physical.

founder.title: Meet Our Founder
founder.name: Dr. Maria de Jesus Gutierrez Navarro
founder.bio: With over 25 years of experience in nephrology, Dr. Gutierrez founded Alba Dialysis with the vision of offering comprehensive and humane treatment to kidney disease patients in the Bajio region.

familyMessage.headline: Don't worry, everything will be alright

familyMessage.description: At Alba, we understand that facing kidney disease can be overwhelming. That's why we're here: to accompany you, support you, and remind you that you're not alone on this journey.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.a1: Hemodialysis is a treatment that uses a machine to filter the blood when the kidneys cannot do it on their own. During the process, blood passes through a special filter called a dialyzer that removes waste and excess fluids.
faq.q2: How long does a dialysis session last?
faq.a2: Generally, each session lasts between 3 and 4 hours, and is performed 3 times a week. The exact duration depends on the individual needs of each patient.
faq.q3: Can I travel if I am on dialysis?
faq.a3: Yes, it is possible to travel. You just need to coordinate your sessions at your destination in advance. Our team can help you find dialysis centers at your destination.
faq.q4: What should I eat during treatment?
faq.a4: It's important to follow a specific diet that limits sodium, potassium, and phosphorus. Our nutrition team will provide you with a personalized plan that fits your needs and preferences.
faq.q5: Can I work while receiving dialysis?
faq.a5: Many patients continue to work while receiving dialysis treatment. We offer flexible schedules to accommodate your work and personal routine.
